2507793.label: PL1000_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_reaction_C
2507793.transcript: Now is not the time to become a martyr!

jp.text: わかっている！抜かりはない！

3879011.label: PL1000_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_reaction_A
3879011.transcript: I'm eager to see their limits!

jp.text: ふん。どれほどのものか、見せてもらおう。
jp.literal: Hmph. How many of you are there? Let's see what you've got.

jp.text: 待ってる！すぐに向かう！
jp.literal: I'm waiting. I'll be right there.

jp.text: 我が行進を止められるか！

10448848.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0500
10448848.transcript: Worry not, like wood, battle feeds my flames.

jp.text: むろんだ。格の違いを教えてやろう
jp.literal: Of course. Let me show you the difference between us.
Don't lose sight of the edge.

16312662.label: PL1000_vo_DUO_buff_A_PL1100
16312662.transcript: I thank you for the boon.

jp.literal: As expected, your stance is impressive.

16437060.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0700
16437060.transcript: Who would've looked for such heart among the dead?

jp.text: まさか幽霊がこれほど頼もしいとはな。
jp.literal: I never thought a ghost could be so reliable.

20352598.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_3
20352598.transcript: I expect much from my vassals.

jp.text: ああ、次も期待している
いい判断だ、ランスロット。

27591371.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0600
27591371.transcript: Fear not, for allies, my flame exists to dispel the darkness.

jp.text: アンズルな。仲間に飛び火しないよう調節はしている。
jp.literal: Don't worry. I'm adjusting so I don't get in my comrades' way.

31827748.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0100
31827748.transcript: Of course. Go and wreak havoc.

jp.text: 好きなだけ暴れてこい
jp.literal: Hmph. Go wild as much as you like.

jp.text: グレンノクルプション！
ああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああ

36755971.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1100
36755971.transcript: Siegfried, our work is not yet done.

jp.text: この町を仕留めていくぞ、ジークフリート！

43169127.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0100
43169127.transcript: We shall sweep over them like wildfire.

jp.text: ああ、一息に片付けるぞ！
jp.literal: I'll clear everything out in one go!

47784198.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1900
47784198.transcript: As long as we are allies, my flame will not harm, but guide you.

jp.text: だが仲間を導く灯でもある。皆の行く道は俺が照らす。
jp.literal: But I'm also a beacon leading my comrades. I'll light the way for everyone.

52476802.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_B
52476802.transcript: Our crew hums like a well-oiled engine!

jp.text: 我らの連携！とことめに焼き付けるがいい！
jp.literal: Our synergy! Let's burn it down!

56622778.label: PL1000_vo_DUO_buff_E_PL0900
56622778.transcript: Behold as I reap our enemies!

jp.text: 我が力を見せてやろう！

57190424.label: PL1000_vo_ETC_lockon_2
57190424.transcript: We can afford them no mercy.

jp.text: 行くぞ！みんなついてこれるな！
ふん。俺を見くびるなよ。
お前、俺を誰だと思ってる。
jp.literal: Who do you think I am?

69224598.label: PL1000_vo_DUO_rescue2_A_PL1100
69224598.transcript: It will take more than that to snuff out my flame!

jp.text: この程度では俺の炎は消えん！
jp.literal: This won't put out my flames!
Victory is right in front of us!
I'll finish this with everything I've got!

75982401.label: PL1000_vo_CMM_emo_yay_2
75982401.transcript: I could ask for no more.

jp.text: ふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふふ

80700884.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_FIRST
80700884.transcript: I'm not done with you, Id. But at the very least, thanks for covering Lyria.

jp.text: いいとめ。ルリアを守ってくれたことには感謝しておく。
jp.literal: I'll hold back. I'm grateful you protected Lyria.

jp.text: レッドデストローション！
ライデンのエラディケート！

86408370.label: PL1000_vo_CMM_emo_pose_5
86408370.transcript: Look well. I'll only do this once.

jp.text: 仕方ない。一度しか見せんぞ。
jp.literal: I can't show it more than once.
Now's our chance! Keep it up!

91285656.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1200
91285656.transcript: There is much I may learn from your technique.

jp.text: ふむ。貴殿の剣技から学べることは多いな。
jp.literal: Hmph. There's much to learn from the swordsmanship of a legend.
Even if you don't tell me!

92406529.label: PL1000_vo_DUO_rescue2_C_PL0900_2
92406529.transcript: Right... and you do it well.

95068930.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0900
95068930.transcript: You are finally of some use.

jp.text: 少しはマシになったようだな。
jp.literal: Looks like you're a bit better.

102059494.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0400
102059494.transcript: Rare to find such power in one so young.

jp.text: なるほど。才に恵まれているな。
jp.literal: I see. You're blessed with the sign.

108441883.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_B
108441883.transcript: You think my flames can't melt steel?

jp.text: 我が炎にどこまで耐えられる
jp.literal: How much longer can you endure my flames?

jp.text: サッサと終わらせるぞ

117708498.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0300
117708498.transcript: You would call me Percy? Hmph. Brave.

jp.literal: I'll crush you with my giant sword!
Hmph. So that's how it is.

jp.text: ああ、このまま消し炭にしてやる！
jp.literal: Oh, I'll wipe you out for good!

jp.text: オレのチカラをミセテヤロウ！
結着をつけさせてもらおうか
jp.literal: Let's bring this to a conclusion.

144231961.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_C
144231961.transcript: End this! The summit lies just ahead!

jp.text: ここを突破すれば、頂上は近い！
jp.literal: If we break through here, the summit is close!

144992762.label: PL1000_vo_NAV_get_snp_2
144992762.transcript: What were you doing there, my wee vassal?

jp.text: こんなところにいたか
エンテイのヤイバ、トクトを味わえ！
jp.literal: The blade of the horizon... taste my wrath!

jp.text: 自身のことも気に留めろ！ダケン！
……お前、何か言おうとしてたか？

161115477.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1100
161115477.transcript: I am still but a shadow of what I will become.

jp.text: まだまだこんなものではないがな。
jp.literal: There's still no way I'm gonna lose to something like this.
You're quite the sight for once.

162978024.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_B
162978024.transcript: Enough, Id! Even a fool knows when he's beaten!

jp.text: ジャマだてするのならば、容赦はせん！
jp.literal: If you're going to interfere, I won't forgive you!

jp.text: エババッテイルバイカ！
この程度、ぞうさもない

174460800.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_NP0300
174460800.transcript: Master of both steel and spell is an army unto himself.

jp.text: 鋭い剣に華麗な魔法。さすがとしか言いようがない。
jp.literal: A sharp sword and blazing magic... I can only say, "as expected."

177752979.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1400
177752979.transcript: The winds blow in our favor.

179115644.label: PL1000_vo_CMM_emo_pose_4
179115644.transcript: Hmph. Are you frightened? You should be.

jp.literal: Heh, I did it. Heh heh heh.

188765329.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1600
188765329.transcript: Two sparks combine into one flame!

jp.text: 火は合わさり、炎となる。

189554959.label: PL1000_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_PL1100_2
189554959.transcript: You shall not fall today, old friend!

jp.text: お前ほどの男が苦戦するとはな
jp.literal: I never thought someone like you would be in such a desperate situation.

191422487.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0900
191422487.transcript: I'll not have a mongrel call me Percy.

jp.text: おい、ダーケン。どさくさでパーサンなどと呼ぶな。
jp.literal: Hey, you damn fool! Don't you dare call me "Papa"!

jp.text: 覚悟しろ！ただでは済まさん！
jp.literal: You'll regret that. I won't let you off easy!

193848075.label: PL1000_vo_CMM_emo_win_5
193848075.transcript: Where there is light, there is always hope.

jp.text: 我が炎で勝利を導くん！
jp.literal: I shall lead you to victory with my flames!

jp.text: さっさと終わらせるぞ

196576468.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_A
196576468.transcript: Generals do not stand above a lord!

jp.text: 道を空けてもらうぞ！将軍！

196818873.label: PL1000_vo_CMM_emo_pose_3
196818873.transcript: If you be mortal, stay clear of my flames.

jp.text: サーガってイロ。ヤケドじゃ済まないからな。
jp.literal: I'm down. I can't let it end with just a burn.

jp.text: イキのあった連携だった。歴戦の鬼騎士の名は伊達ではないな。
jp.literal: That was a well-coordinated link. The name "Master of the Battlefield" isn't just for show.

206373174.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0600
206373174.transcript: I am grateful for the aid.

jp.literal: I like the way it scatters!

209865369.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1500
209865369.transcript: It seems the yarns about you are threaded with truth.

jp.text: 伝説はダテではないということか
jp.literal: So the legend is no lie.
I'm going to keep moving forward!

214577200.label: PL1000_vo_CMM_emo_pose_6
214577200.transcript: Pose, you say? How's this? I've grown soft.

jp.text: 決めポーズ！これで満足か？まったく。
jp.literal: Final pose. Are you satisfied now? Not at all.

jp.text: まったくもって悪趣味が過ぎる
jp.literal: I'm completely overwhelmed by the sheer amount of malice.

219416668.label: PL1000_vo_ETC_lockon_5
219416668.transcript: Stand down, if you value your lives.

jp.text: 攻撃の手を緩めるなよ
jp.literal: Don't let up on the offense!

237790602.label: PL1000_vo_ATK_ability_4_3
237790602.transcript: I will be your guiding light!

jp.text: この程度、大した傷ではない
jp.literal: This is nothing but a minor scratch.
Even if you don't tell me to.

240117032.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1700
240117032.transcript: Between your partner and I, whose flame burns stronger?

jp.text: おまえの相棒の炎とどっちが上かな？
jp.literal: Your ally's flames... which one's stronger?

243723240.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_NP0300
243723240.transcript: A forthright will means a steady sword.

jp.text: 俺の理想が遂えぬ限り、決して消えぬ炎だ。
jp.literal: As long as my ideals live on, this flame will never go out.

244300717.label: PL1000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_finish_2
244300717.transcript: I see my vassals have good taste.

jp.text: カシン殿の期待に応えたまでだ
jp.literal: I've answered the expectations of my kin.

jp.text: ウオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオ

260577502.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_FIRST
260577502.transcript: There is power in unity. That much is certain.

jp.text: これが絆の力というものなのか
jp.literal: So this is what the power of bonds is...
I'll show you the full bloom!

272925982.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1700
272925982.transcript: You would run headlong into an inferno.

jp.text: 残り火にも躊躇なく突っ込むとは。
jp.literal: I'll charge in without hesitation, even on the last day.

274456894.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0900
274456894.transcript: Well, stir up fire and you will be burned.

jp.text: 消し済みにされたいのか？

274769550.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_C
274769550.transcript: It should be on its last legs!

jp.text: 今のが致命打となるはずだ
jp.literal: This is the moment that will become your epitaph!

jp.text: アンズルナ！俺についてこい！

278690516.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0100
278690516.transcript: 'Tis the final darkening before the dawn.

jp.text: 心配無用だ。俺が付いているからな。
jp.literal: No need to worry. I've got your back.

284784716.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1500
284784716.transcript: I must learn what I can from this battle.

jp.text: 伝説の大剣豪と肩を並べる貴重な機会。無駄にはできん。
jp.literal: An opportunity to stand shoulder to shoulder with a legendary swordsman. I can't afford to waste it.
No need to tell me that!

287301636.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_FIRST
287301636.transcript: Your day of reckoning has come, Angra Mainyu!

jp.text: アンラマンユウ。今度は倒してみせる。
jp.literal: I'll show you what I'm made of. This time, I'll definitely defeat you!

jp.text: お前にとっては足りないか
jp.literal: Is it too easy for you?

304715266.label: PL1000_vo_SP_charge_speak_2
304715266.transcript: By my blade of adamant, bright!

jp.text: グレンにもいる援護の矢よ！
jp.literal: Even the Gren have a sword of enlightenment.

305434632.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0200
305434632.transcript: It must... to keep fear and despair at bay.

jp.text: 希望の灯たる援帝として、当然のことをしたまえだ。
jp.literal: As the torch of hope, I must do what is only natural.

jp.text: いつもの元気はどうした
jp.literal: What happened to your usual energy?

jp.text: カオスデトネーション！

336845623.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1600
336845623.transcript: Shall we compare? Which burns brighter, I wonder.

jp.text: 比べてみるか。俺の炎と

338646329.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_2
338646329.transcript: To act in concert is a thing of beauty.

jp.text: ふん。いい気があったな。
どいていろ！俺が決める！

346864994.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_2_FIRST
346864994.transcript: Spare these foul creatures no quarter!

jp.text: やつのもとへ守りを近づけさせぬ！
jp.literal: I'll bring the shield to him!

349980064.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_A
349980064.transcript: Do not shrink! We must prevail!

jp.text: 決して勝てる相手などではない！
jp.literal: I am no opponent to be easily defeated!

jp.text: 我が炎と剣で切り開く！
jp.literal: I shall cleave through with my flames and sword!

351531479.label: PL1000_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_C
351531479.transcript: Keep your eyes trained on the enemy!

jp.literal: Don't take your eyes off the enemy!

355542973.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_2
355542973.transcript: Who do you think you're commanding?

jp.text: ディアストロフィズム！
同じ要領で次も仕掛けるぞ！
jp.literal: I'll hit the next one with the same technique!
I'm in your way! Get out of my way!
I'm getting hot for the fight!

362528007.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_FIRST
362528007.transcript: Even a god cannot stave off my flames!

jp.text: 我が炎、神をも焼き尽くさん！
jp.literal: My flames will burn even the gods!

363581234.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_FIRST
363581234.transcript: I'll reduce you to pieces in no time!

jp.text: クダルン！破壊してくれる！

368075437.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1900
368075437.transcript: The Lord of Flames does not shrink from battle.

jp.text: 誰に言っている。この園庭に不可能はない。
jp.literal: Who are you talking to? Nothing is impossible within this boundary.

jp.text: ギリスをあぶりだすぞ！

368862621.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_3
368862621.transcript: Let us carry this passion forward!

370620805.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_1st_1_FIRST
370620805.transcript: This one's a worthy foe, Wind Primal notwithstanding.

jp.text: 風を操る聖槍銃か。相手にとって不足はない。
jp.literal: A wind-controlling holy marksman? That's no disadvantage to the opponent.

377212510.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_A
377212510.transcript: How much more punishment can you take?

jp.text: 果たして、どこまで受けきれるかな
jp.literal: I wonder just how much more you can take.

380419742.label: PL1000_vo_DUO_rescue2_B_PL1100
380419742.transcript: I will not stand for this!

381074781.label: PL1000_vo_DUO_rescue2_A_PL0900
381074781.transcript: Stop being so dramatic. I'm fine.

jp.text: ワメクな。これ式のこと、問題ない。
jp.literal: I'm fine. I can handle this.

381472578.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1600
381472578.transcript: Our verse makes for quite the companion.

jp.text: アルベス、なかなかに見事だ

381815294.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_A
381815294.transcript: Behold the might of the Lord of Flames!

jp.text: エンテイのチカラ！ドクトミユ！
jp.literal: The power of the infinite! I'll take you down!

jp.text: ほう、あれを生み出すとは

401913228.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_A
401913228.transcript: It deserves a second chance. Let us be the ones to give it to him.

jp.text: ここまできたなら、最後まで面倒を見てやるか。
jp.literal: If you've come this far, I might as well see you through to the end.

405830587.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_FIRST
405830587.transcript: This castle has stood the test of time. It won't fall to Avia!

jp.text: この規模の城を陥落させるとはな。強断め。
jp.literal: To conquer a castle of this scale... Impressive.

406891993.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_B
406891993.transcript: You sheep follow the wrong shepherd!

jp.text: そうひょうどもが、ちり！

409550719.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_1_FIRST
409550719.transcript: Embrace my fire! Return from whence you came!

jp.text: 我が炎で焼き払ってくれるわ！猛龍殿！
jp.literal: I'll burn it all away with my flames. Don't worry.
So this is where it ends?

jp.text: ランカイのテンペスト！

jp.literal: I'll go ahead and say it.

421099118.label: PL1000_vo_ATK_ability_4_1
421099118.transcript: Let loose the fires of war!

jp.text: ぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐぐ
大丈夫か、ジークフリート！
jp.literal: I'll take it from here, Siegfried.

jp.text: 一応俺は言っておこう
jp.literal: I'll go ahead and say it.

437095484.label: PL1000_vo_DUO_rescue2_C_PL0800
437095484.transcript: Blast! They will rue this day!

jp.literal: Damn it! I won't let you get away with this!
Hurry up and come over here!

439135660.label: PL1000_vo_DUO_buff_A_PL0900
439135660.transcript: You chose well to support me.

440306964.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0300
440306964.transcript: You've yet strength in reserve, Rackam.

jp.text: ラカム！もっとやれるだろ！
強化など打ち消してくれる
ショウキ！このまま攻めろ！

458144953.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_B
458144953.transcript: Watch for a pause in its attacks!

jp.text: やつらの隙を見逃すなよ！

458689796.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_3
458689796.transcript: Stay at the ready! War never sleeps!

jp.text: まだまだこんなものではないはずだ。俺たちの力を！
jp.literal: There's no way something like this is enough! Our power!

461051152.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1100
461051152.transcript: Never have I seen you missstep, Siegfried.

jp.text: お前には油断などありはしないか
jp.literal: You don't know the meaning of "careless", do you?

462381708.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0700

I'll break this down step by step:

1. First, identify the speaker: The speaker is Percival (パーシヴァル).

2. The Japanese line is: このまま崩すぞ！ (Kono mama kuzusu zo!)

3. Break down the Japanese:
   - このまま (kono mama) = "like this" or "as is"
   - 崩すぞ (kuzusu zo) = "I'll destroy it" or "I'll bring it down"

4. The phrase is a battle cry showing determination to destroy something.

5. The context mentions this is during a skill

909276297.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_B
909276297.transcript: I need only one blade to fell you!

jp.text: 剣の数を揃えたところで、何になる
jp.literal: Now that we've got our swords in line, what's next?

911676502.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_FIRST
911676502.transcript: I've grown accustomed to fighting in these skies.

jp.text: ゼーガの空にも馴染んできた頃か
jp.literal: Even Zeta's sky has grown familiar to me.

jp.text: ナラクのフォールダウン！

915532908.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_A
915532908.transcript: The road ahead is long, but we must press on.

jp.text: 今は前を見て進むしかあるまい
jp.literal: I can only move forward by looking ahead.
I'm sorry to have troubled you.

917355421.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_FIRST
917355421.transcript: Parlor tricks won't stop us, sorceress!

jp.text: クーダラン極芸に惑わされるとでも
jp.literal: Even if I'm dazzled by your ridiculous music.

919613456.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_A
919613456.transcript: You reap what you sow, Eid.

jp.text: 覚悟はできているの。行くぞ！
ハハハハハハハハハハハハ

921988548.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_FIRST
921988548.transcript: This wind is all howl and no bite!

jp.text: 吹きすさぶ風に圧倒されるなよ！
jp.literal: Don't get overwhelmed by the wind that blows you away.

922892025.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_NP0300
922892025.transcript: Hah! Are there no limits to your power?

jp.literal: I can't let you get away with this.

jp.text: 格の違いを教えてやろう！
jp.literal: I'll show you the difference between us!

jp.text: こちらも負けてはいらぬ！
jp.literal: I can't afford to lose either.

929814959.label: PL1000_vo_NAV_enemy_break_A
929814959.transcript: Don't let this chance slip by!

jp.literal: Don't miss your chance to attack!

jp.text: 心配はいらん。俺に続け！
jp.literal: No need to worry. Leave it to me!

931636033.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_C
931636033.transcript: She puts up a good fight.

jp.literal: Hmph. It's got some weight to it.

jp.text: うううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううううう

933209619.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_B
933209619.transcript: Though I chafe at Id's disposition, I will not abandon him.

jp.text: 気に食わん奴だったが、ミスてるわけにはいかん。
jp.literal: He was a tough one, but I can't afford to miss.

934724289.label: PL1000_vo_DUO_rescue2_B_PL1100_3
934724289.transcript: Fear not, I shall burn them all to cinders!

jp.text: 我が炎の神髄を見せてやる！
jp.literal: Show me the true essence of my flames!

939942462.label: PL1000_vo_DUO_rescue2_B_4
939942462.transcript: My flames are not snuffed so easily.

jp.text: この炎、そう簡単に消せると思うなよ！
jp.literal: This flame... don't think you can erase it that easily!

941796368.label: PL1000_vo_CMM_emo_win_1
941796368.transcript: Let us have a king's feast.

jp.text: フン。凱旋するとしよう。
jp.literal: Hmph. Let's make it a duel.

942154419.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0200
942154419.transcript: Your ice could freeze the blood of a dragon.

942296192.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_C
942296192.transcript: Lilith! Are you so blind as to what you have become?

jp.text: リリス！無様な姿と思わんのか！
jp.literal: You think I'm in a pitiful state?
No way to deal with you!

949898164.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_FIRST
949898164.transcript: There's plenty more where that came from!

jp.text: どうした？さあ、反撃してみせる！
jp.literal: What's wrong? I'll show you my counterattack!

951186647.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1200
951186647.transcript: Virtue has blessed your blade, Knight of Lumiel.

jp.text: これがデュミエル聖剣技か
jp.literal: So this is the Dumielle's authority?

956430016.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_NP0300
956430016.transcript: I see you have no need of a guardian.

jp.text: なるほど。気遣いは不要というわけか。
jp.literal: I see. So you're saying there's no need to worry about it?

jp.text: ブーザマな姿を見せたな
jp.literal: I showed you a disgraceful sight.

959954386.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_3st_1_FIRST
959954386.transcript: This knave will not go down easily!

jp.literal: This guy... He's definitely going to do it.
Leave the next one to me.

978824708.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1300
978824708.transcript: No, I'd say you've grown sharper.

jp.text: 油断するな。次があるぞ。
jp.literal: Don't let your guard down. There's more to come.

988992830.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_FIRST
988992830.transcript: Stay on the move! Don't let them surround us!

jp.text:
三回して迎撃しろ！  
敵に囲まれぬよう立ち回れ！
jp.literal: Flammenmarsch! Macht! Zerreissen! Royal Authority! Feuerangriff! Roter Wirbel! Traumerei! X-Seele! Flammen Rustung! Adrenaline Rush! Lohenwolf!

989965717.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1300
989965717.transcript: And yet I have never seen a blade like yours.

jp.text: これが変幻自在の剣。是非とも手合わせしたいものだ。
jp.literal: This is the sword of divine will. I'd be honored to fight alongside you.
Not yet! Don't let your guard down!
I'm not letting my guard down yet.

998207262.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0600
998207262.transcript: An inferno brings only destruction, but my flames may kindle hope.

jp.text: 当然だ。我が炎は希望の灯火。皆の明日を照らす光だからな。
jp.literal: Of course. My flame is the torch of hope, the light that illuminates everyone's tomorrow.

jp.text: ここは俺に任せておけ
今の動きは理想的だったな

1006264959.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0900
1006264959.transcript: I see you've been at your training.

jp.text: お前も真面目に鍛錬はしていたようだな。
jp.literal: You've been training hard too, huh?

1006438941.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_A
1006438941.transcript: Underestimate my flames at your own peril.

jp.text: この程度で、炎帝の炎は全員！
jp.literal: Even this much, the flames of the horizon will never die!
So you've come to challenge me?

1018446068.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1700
1018446068.transcript: Can you now? Then I shall revel in the flame!

jp.text: 過言は不要か。望むところだ。
jp.literal: No need for restraint. I'll take it!

1025403670.label: PL1000_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_PL1100_1
1025403670.transcript: Come now, Siegfried! You're better than this!

jp.text: ラスクないな、ジークフリート
jp.literal: You're not looking too good, Siegfried.

1029073018.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0600
1029073018.transcript: That was not the full measure of my skill.

jp.text: 俺の全力はこんなものではない
jp.literal: My full power is not something like this.

jp.text: 攻撃し続ける！隙を見せろ！
jp.literal: Keep attacking! I'll cover your back!

jp.text: お前たち、なかなかやるな

1041145714.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1800
1041145714.transcript: All that face me shall turn to ash.

jp.text: ハイになりたい奴はドイツだ
jp.literal: I'm not interested in becoming a servant.

jp.text: なんとしても食い止めるぞ！
jp.literal: I'll stop you no matter what!

jp.text: 今の感覚を忘れるなよ
jp.literal: Don't forget how you feel right now.
I'm not going to let you get away with that!

1047985679.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_3st_2_FIRST
1047985679.transcript: You've dug your own grave, vile beast!

jp.text: どうなっても知らんぞ！銀狼とやる！
jp.literal: I don't care what happens! I'll crush you with my silver blade!

1048621634.label: PL1000_vo_DUO_rescue2_A_PL0800
1048621634.transcript: I'll return the favor someday, Lancelot.

jp.text: 借りは返すぞ、ランスロット！
なかなかやるようだが、見くびるなよ
jp.literal: You're quite something, but don't get cocky.

1054809715.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0700
1054809715.transcript: It is as constant as my will.

jp.text: この胸の熱い想いは、誰にも止められまい。
jp.literal: This burning passion in my heart... no one can stop it.

jp.text: チッ、うっとうしいことこの上ないぞ！
jp.literal: I've got no choice but to deal with this annoying situation!

1059677834.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0400
1059677834.transcript: Pity comes later. Worry for your comrades first.

jp.text: 戦場で迷いは仲間が危険にさらされるからな
jp.literal: If you get lost on the battlefield, your comrades will be in danger.

1060414539.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1500
1060414539.transcript: How does the flesh of a mortal rival undying steel?

jp.text: これは権圧か。なんと凄まじい。
jp.literal: This is a sword technique? How amazing!

1062707430.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_A
1062707430.transcript: I shall wager my very soul!

jp.text: エンテイのワザのすべてを見せてやる！
jp.literal: I'll show you all the techniques of the infinite!

jp.text: 相手が悪かったな。喰らえ！
jp.literal: You picked the wrong opponent. Die!

33192518.label: PL1000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0400
33192518.transcript: I see. Her sorcery fans my flames.

jp.text: 我が炎が魔法に乗り、逆巻いたか！
jp.literal: My flames ride upon magic—did you not see?

40441407.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2800
40441407.transcript: There is bite within your skill.

jp.text: 強い想いがこもった技だ
jp.literal: A technique infused with a strong will.

42015707.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2700
42015707.transcript: Hmph. As well you should be.

jp.text: お前、俺を誰だと思ってる。
jp.literal: Who do you think I am?

jp.text: 敵め、まだ立ち上がるか
jp.literal: Enemy! Still trying to get back up?

78869956.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2400
78869956.transcript: Well executed. I lead, you follow!

jp.text: その調子だ！俺についてこい！

92899537.label: PL1000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2500
92899537.transcript: Intriguing technique. Consider me an admirer.

jp.text: 鋼の剣か。実に興味深い
jp.literal: Your steel-clad duel is truly fascinating.

100068262.label: PL1000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1900
100068262.transcript: Let's see you channel that rage!

jp.text: 出し惜しみなどしてくれるなよ

100862461.label: PL1000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2800
100862461.transcript: The next fight is soon upon us.

jp.literal: Alright, let's prepare for the next one!

106134703.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2900
106134703.transcript: Yes. And the six dragons will always have a place in my court.

jp.text: カシンに六竜を据えるというのも、悪くはないな。
jp.literal: It's not a bad idea to have a dragon in the family.

110508213.label: PL1000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0200
110508213.transcript: And yet there is no heat that can melt the steel of your conviction.

jp.text: これほど真の強い剣、そうそう解けることはないだろう。
jp.literal: A sword this truly powerful... won't melt so easily.

121067822.label: PL1000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2700
121067822.transcript: Let my conduct be my advocate, and your eyes the jury.

jp.text: ならば、我が王道をもって証明するまでだ。
jp.literal: Then I shall prove it with my royal way!

141730897.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2500
141730897.transcript: I half expected you to miss your cue.

jp.text: ホオ？今のに合わせるとはな。
jp.literal: Hoh? You're actually keeping up with me.
A torch that illuminates the darkness.

170974443.label: PL1000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1500
170974443.transcript: No words can capture the might of the Eternal Rage style!

jp.text: ここは無双流の奥義。まさかこれほどとはな。
jp.literal: The invincible dragon's breath... Could it be this powerful?

181774667.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2600
181774667.transcript: All the dignity of a donkey, with the strength of an ox.

jp.text: まるでジャジャウマのようだが、技は洗練されているな。
jp.literal: You're just like a toy soldier, but your moves are well-practiced.

213467941.label: PL1000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2400
213467941.transcript: Very well. Come. I shall burn away your pride.

jp.text: それは構わんが、巻き込まれても泣いてくれるなよ。
jp.literal: That's a kamawan. Don't cry even if you get caught up in it.

217024905.label: PL1000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2200
217024905.transcript: This ground will be your pyre!

jp.text: エンテイの炎に焼かれるがいい
jp.literal: Better to be burned by the flames of the end!

248067037.label: PL1000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1400
248067037.transcript: Each quick stroke, a star falling from the heavens.

jp.text: まさに一閃！流星降臨とも言うべきか！
jp.literal: A true clash of titans... should I call it a meteoric duel?

267515171.label: PL1000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0800
267515171.transcript: Hmph. I daresay you've gotten better.

jp.text: ほう？腕を上げたようだな、ランスロット。
jp.literal: Huh? Looks like you're raising your arm, Lancelot.

292704455.label: PL1000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2300
292704455.transcript: If you weren't an eternal, I would torch you for that.

jp.text: お前が十天衆でなければ、消し済みにしていたところだ。
jp.literal: If you weren't a Ten-Point Saint, I'd have erased you already.

293853379.label: PL1000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0700
293853379.transcript: And they shall continue to burn, steadfast and undying.

jp.literal: I promise to keep shining light so you won't lose your way.

329870774.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2700
329870774.transcript: Then I will bury them in their own ash!

jp.text: 次は消し済みにしてやる

343878367.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2800
343878367.transcript: You are a fiend on the battlefield.

jp.text: おお、悪魔的な強さだな。

346519963.label: PL1000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0300
346519963.transcript: Not all that glitters is gold.

jp.text: ふん。格好など二の次だかな。
jp.literal: Hmph. I don't really care about appearances.

352132749.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2900
352132749.transcript: No darkness shall smother the light of my flame.

jp.text: 我が炎は、深淵の闇すらも照らせるだろうか。
jp.literal: My flames... will they even light up the deepest darkness?

378213812.label: PL1000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1700
378213812.transcript: I respect a warrior who fights without fear.

jp.text: おそれをものともしない戦い方だな
jp.literal: A fighting style that doesn't even fear death.

384574184.label: PL1000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1200
384574184.transcript: My flames now roar with the voice of justice!

jp.text: 綺麗な正義の心には響いたかな？
jp.literal: Did my righteous heart of flame resonate with you?

413259177.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2400
413259177.transcript: A general who can lead and follow.

421116003.label: PL1000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1100
421116003.transcript: My skill is but a pale flame compared to yours.

jp.text: だが、まだお前ほどの境地には至らんさ。ジークフリート。
jp.literal: But I'm not quite at your level yet, Siegfried.

421335078.label: PL1000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2800
421335078.transcript: A fire's strength is determined by the hand that stokes it.

jp.text: あつかるものしだいで、ほのおはさまざまなへんかをみせるからだ
jp.literal: It all depends on who's wielding it. The flames can take on many different forms.

421442179.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2400
421442179.transcript: All the strength and grace of an angry bull.

jp.text: ふん。申し分ない威力だな。

430216232.label: PL1000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2900
430216232.transcript: Remember this. Mortality is not a sign of weakness.

jp.text: ふん、舐めてもらっては困る
jp.literal: I'd be in trouble if you just let me off easy.

449614031.label: PL1000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1900
449614031.transcript: Hmph. A sharp blade and a sharper eye.

jp.text: ほう？お前は見込みがあるようだな

491414268.label: PL1000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0900
491414268.transcript: Pull back, mongrel! You're too exposed!

jp.text: ダーケン！あまり前に出すぎるなよ！
jp.literal: Dahken, don't go too far ahead.

502167143.label: PL1000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2900
502167143.transcript: Darkness breeds unrest. But yours is different.

jp.text: これが六龍の力か。さすがだな。
jp.literal: This is the power of the Six Dragons. As expected.

jp.text: ふん、この程度じゃお粗末ね
jp.literal: Hmph. This is nothing to me.

536765855.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2700
536765855.transcript: Securing peace is an arduous task.

jp.text: 平穏と静寂には程遠い状況か。
jp.literal: Peace and tranquility are far from our current situation.

551034913.label: PL1000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2400
551034913.transcript: On a scale of one to ten, that was a six.

jp.text: ふん。今のは救出移転だな。
jp.literal: Hmph. That was a pretty big hit.

576634470.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2900
576634470.transcript: Hah! I almost pity our foes.

jp.text: ふむ、相手が不憫に感じるほどだ
jp.literal: Hmph. I can tell the opponent's off-balance.

jp.text: フラメクのイカズチ。さすがの威力と言える。
jp.literal: Flammenk's lightning strike... Truly a display of power.

599588671.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2700
599588671.transcript: I will lead the next assault.

jp.literal: Next, I'll cut down the vanguard.

600251989.label: PL1000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1500
600251989.transcript: No matter the strategy, a well fought battle is worth celebration.

jp.text: いいだろ。塵一つ残さず蹴散らしてくれる
jp.literal: Alright. I'll clear the field of every last one.

jp.text: 巻き込まれるなよ、団長！

636391798.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2900
636391798.transcript: Hold your tongue. We've still a fight to win.

jp.text: 何の質問だ。戦いに集中しろ。
jp.literal: What question? Focus on the fight!

jp.text: 今の連携は見事だったな
我が炎で燃え尽きるがいい！

654333573.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2500
654333573.transcript: As long as there are those in need of its light, my fire shall burn on.

jp.text: いつまでも輝ける炎であり続けたいものだ
jp.literal: I want to remain a flame that shines forever.

654576486.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2500
654576486.transcript: A leader must grow to fit their title.

jp.text: 名は太陽を表すとも言うからな。
まだいけるか、ロゼッタ！

678365932.label: PL1000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1800
678365932.transcript: I do not sound like that alchemist.

jp.text: シャーカスナ、錬金術師。
jp.literal: I'll show you the truth, alchemist.

692477957.label: PL1000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1600
692477957.transcript: I can see why you were selected to lead a knightly order.

jp.text: なるほど。元騎士団筆頭の実力は伊達ではないな。
jp.literal: I see. The skill of the former knight leader is no joke.

694850536.label: PL1000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1400
694850536.transcript: Unchecked, a single flame can consume the world.

jp.text: そうだな。俺が勝利への道を切り開く！
jp.literal: That's right. I'll carve the path to victory!
Hmph. So that's how you see it.
Alright, leave the next one to me!

748063782.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2400
748063782.transcript: Is he mad? Or simply a fool?

jp.text: 何を突然。アホなのか。この男。
jp.literal: What the hell? Is this guy an idiot?

752114135.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2400
752114135.transcript: Tis the hour the wolves of flame and silver howl together!

jp.text: さあ、指図め。炎狼と白狼の共演というところだな。
jp.literal: So, it's a collaboration between the Crimson and White Dragons, then.

jp.text: 見くびってもらっては困る
jp.literal: I'd be in trouble if you looked down on me.

793483186.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2900
793483186.transcript: Of course. My path is lit by an unwavering vision.

jp.text: ふん。当然だろ。俺の意思で歩んでいるのだからな。
jp.literal: Hmph. Of course. I'm walking my path by my own will.

796586595.label: PL1000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2200
796586595.transcript: I doubt you could march to the beat of another's drum.

jp.text: お前が導いた通りに歩むとは思えんが
jp.literal: I can't believe you're following the path you've led...

811451809.label: PL1000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0200
811451809.transcript: What beast can withstand fire and ice in concert?

jp.text: カタリナ、この連携で相手もたまらないはずだ。
jp.literal: Even the enemy will be overwhelmed by the combination of fire and ice.

833517426.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2500
833517426.transcript: Step back, or you risk injury.

jp.text: やけどしたくなければ下がっている
jp.literal: If you don't want to get burned, stay back!

840283574.label: PL1000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1300
840283574.transcript: So this is a blade unburdened by doubt.

jp.text: 迷いなき剣閃とはこのことか！
jp.literal: So this is what a fearless frontline combat is like!

895367530.label: PL1000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0800
895367530.transcript: You should know me better than to ask.

jp.text: ふん。言わないと分からん中でもないだろ。
jp.literal: Hmph. You don't need me to spell it out for you, do you?

921829682.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2800
921829682.transcript: Indeed. It always consumes my mark.

jp.text: ああ、攻めの手を緩めるなよ
jp.literal: Don't let up on the offense.

944422863.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2800
944422863.transcript: Save your gratitude for after we've finished.

jp.text: レーナどっいっている場合ではないだろ！
jp.literal: I don't think now is the time for such talk.

969505902.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2500
969505902.transcript: As is the steel of your conviction.

jp.text: 思いの強さで言えば、お前も人のことは言えないのでは？
jp.literal: If it's about the strength of one's convictions, then you can't really say anything about people either, can you?

993427396.label: PL1000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0700
993427396.transcript: Tell them not to fear my flames.

jp.text: 我が炎に怯んでくれるなよ
jp.literal: Don't get in the way of my flames.

1012833035.label: PL1000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0600
1012833035.transcript: This light is an undying beacon.

jp.text: ああ、人を導く灯であり続けたいものだ
jp.literal: I want to remain a guiding light for others.

jp.text: なかなかやるものだな、ベアトリクス。
何か問題でもあるのか？

1040260724.label: PL1000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2600
1040260724.transcript: What in the skies is wrong with you?

jp.text: 盛り上がっている場合か
jp.literal: You're getting fired up, are you?

1050186227.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2600
1050186227.transcript: Indeed. The very same one who designed yours.

jp.text: 組織の防具もだいぶ前衛的な見た目だと思うが
jp.literal: Your organization's armor has quite a retro look.

jp.text: これは、ミナウを導く炎だ！
jp.literal: This is the flame that leads the way forward!

1060970235.label: PL1000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2100
1060970235.transcript: A leader who can weave dreams into reality.

jp.text: 叶えてこそ理想。そうだろう。
jp.literal: The ideal that must be fulfilled... isn't that right?

1068347668.label: PL1000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0300
1068347668.transcript: What say we rain hell on our foes?

jp.text: よし！この勢いを絶やすなよ！
jp.literal: Alright, don't let this momentum slack off!

jp.text: 腕立て伏せ。鍛錬のうちにも入らん。
jp.literal: I'll take on the training too.

323262712.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2200
323262712.transcript: I expected excellence, and that's what I received.

jp.text: 十天衆の剣技、さすがと言える
jp.literal: The swordsmanship of a ten-point master. You could say it's impressive.

380774141.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2200
380774141.transcript: Perfect synergy. Now show me again!

jp.text: 理想的な連携だった。次に備えるぞ。
jp.literal: That was an ideal cooperation. Let's prepare for the next one.

540123187.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2300
540123187.transcript: Seems you had the situation under control by yourself.

jp.text: おれが出るまでもなかっただろうではないか
jp.literal: Hmph. I didn't think I'd have to step in.

612609487.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2200
612609487.transcript: Seofon, be honest. Were you holding back?

jp.text: シエテ。まさか手を抜いてはいまいや。
jp.literal: Seofon, you wouldn't actually pull out on me, would you?

637658074.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2300
637658074.transcript: I'm not above mixing science with warcraft.

658812576.label: PL1000_vo_CMM_emo_abs_1
658812576.transcript: Let's begin. One. Two. Three. Four. Five. Six. Good enough.

jp.text: さて、一、二、三、四、五、六、よし！
jp.literal: So, one, two, three, four, five, six. Alright!

jp.text: ……はっ……はっ……はっ……はっ……はっ……はっ……はっ……はっ……はっ……はっ……はっ……はっ……はっ……はっ……はっ……はっ……はっ……はっ……はっ……はっ……はっ……はっ……はっ……はっ……はっ……はっ……はっ……はっ……はっ……はっ……はっ……はっ……はっ……はっ……はっ……はっ……はっ……はっ……はっ……はっ……はっ……はっ……は

718263010.label: PL1000_vo_CMM_emo_squat_3
718263010.transcript: Huh! Huh! Huh! Huh! Huh! Huh! Huh! Huh! Huh! Huh!

jp.text: ……ふっ……ふっ……ふっ……ふっ……ふっ……ふっ……

730198955.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2300
730198955.transcript: I will burn them all to cinders!

jp.text: すべてを燃やし尽くす！
jp.literal: I'll burn everything to the ground!

821900522.label: PL1000_vo_CMM_emo_pushup_1
821900522.transcript: One, two, three, four, five, six. Are we done?

jp.text: ふん。一。二。三。四。五。六。もういいか。
jp.literal: Hmph. One, two, three, four, five, six. Huh. That's enough.

823234901.label: PL1000_vo_CMM_emo_squat_1
823234901.transcript: One... two... three... four... five... six...

jp.literal: One, two, three, four, five, six.

839337500.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2300
839337500.transcript: I shall never stop my march. Not until my flames have completely burnt out.

jp.text: この炎が燃え続ける限り、俺は歩みを止めん！
jp.literal: As long as this flame burns on, I won't stop shooting my bow.

888709374.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2300
888709374.transcript: Your arrows are sharp, your aim is true.

jp.text: 鋭い一撃。狙いも正確だな。
jp.literal: Sharp instincts. Your aim's accurate too.

909394720.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2200
909394720.transcript: In my case, it's correct to believe the rumors.

jp.text: ふん。侮ってもらっては困る
jp.literal: I'd be in trouble if you got carried away.

jp.text: 援護は任されるぞ、ソーン！

1060578213.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2200
1060578213.transcript: Actually, I'm still waiting for the Star-Sword Sovereign to show his true colors.

jp.text: お前こそ、そろそろ本気を出したらどうだ。天星剣王。
jp.literal: You should probably start showing your true power. Heaven's Sword King.

40156356.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2100
40156356.transcript: Well, Sandalphon, it seems you have excellent taste.

jp.text: ほう？なかなか見る目があるな、サンダルフォン。
jp.literal: Oh? You've got quite the eye for detail, Sandalphon.

123712459.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2100
123712459.transcript: Hah. And here you've seen but a flicker of my influence.

jp.text: もっと火力を上げてやっても構わないが
jp.literal: Heh. I don't mind if you turn up the firepower.

238197575.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2100
238197575.transcript: As expected of the almighty Sandalphon.

jp.text: さすがにやるな、サンダルフォン。
この炎、決して絶やしてなるものか！
jp.literal: This flame... will never be extinguished!

894466459.label: PL1000_vo_CMM_emo_shout_3
894466459.transcript: On me! I shall guide you!

jp.literal: I'll keep going until the very end!

915704578.label: PL1000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2100
915704578.transcript: I would have it no other way. Now, on to the next foe.

jp.text: ああ、計算通りだ。次に備えるぞ。
jp.literal: Huh. As expected. Let's prepare for what comes next.
I won't give up this victory!

987461087.label: PL1000_vo_CMM_emo_onigiri_2
987461087.transcript: I need a moment. We may continue.

jp.text: しばし待て。ほむ。ほむほむ。ほむ。うむ。では行こうか。
jp.literal: Hold on a sec. Hmm. Hmm. Hmm. Well then, shall we go?
